meta.title: Treasure Hunt
meta.description: Chase hidden codes through the lanes of historic Al Fahidi: follow the hints, check in at real places, and collect badges

header.title: Treasure Hunt
header.intro: Hidden codes wait at real spots between the sikkas of Al Fahidi. Read each hint, find the stop in the district, then enter the code you discover there to check in and earn badges.

progress.label: Hunt progress
progress.summary: {found, plural, =0 {No stops discovered yet — your first hint is waiting} other {You discovered {foundText} of {totalText} stops}}
progress.complete: Hunt complete! You walked the quarter lane by lane and gathered every code — you are now a keeper of Al Fahidi's memory.

code.label: Code for “{title}”
code.hint: The code is six Latin letters and digits, written at the stop itself.
code.wrong: That code isn't right — double-check what you found at the stop and try again.
code.failed: Couldn't verify right now — check your connection and try again shortly.
code.correct: Correct! Your check-in at “{name}” is recorded.

badges.title: Badge shelf
badges.count: {count, plural, =0 {No badges yet} one {# badge} other {# badges}}
badges.empty: Your shelf is still empty — discover your first stop to earn your first badge.
badges.threshold: {count, plural, one {Awarded at # stop} other {Awarded at # stops}}

modal.title: New badge!
modal.subtitle: Added to your shelf — keep the hunt going to collect the rest.

state.error: Couldn't load the hunt stops. Make sure the server is running, then retry.
